title: ✅ Valid auto claim (clean approval)
description: Active policy, matching name, modest amount, no red flags → expect APPROVE.

title: ✅ Original demo claim (Charlie Wilson)
description: The original repo's sample form: active policy POL-53276, no amount stated.

title: ⛔ Claim on an expired policy
description: Home policy POL-67890 expired before the incident → expect DENY.

title: 🚩 Suspicious whiplash claim (new customer)
description: Brand-new policy, rear-end collision, whiplash, no witnesses → expect FLAG_FOR_REVIEW.

title: 💰 High-value claim near the policy limit
description: $70,500 claim on a $76,889-limit policy → expect FLAG (high value + near limit).

title: ❓ Missing policy number
description: No policy number anywhere → expect NEEDS_INFO and a confirmation prompt. (Sofia Ramirez's real policy is POL-88472: find it in the Database Explorer.)

title: 🔎 Garbled scan (OCR-quality text)
description: Policy number mangled by OCR (P0L-S3276) → expect a fuzzy-match confirmation prompt suggesting POL-53276 (Charlie Wilson).

title: 🚩 Repeat claimant (claim velocity)
description: 4th claim in six months on POL-31415, minor damage + rental car pattern → expect FLAG.

title: 🚩 Claimant is not the policyholder
description: Claim filed by 'Tom Brown' on Alice Brown's home policy POL-55295 → expect FLAG.

title: ⛔ Not an insurance claim
description: A bakery newsletter: the agent should call no tools and DENY.
